_comment: Copy to config/targets.json (gitignored) and fill with REAL targets. Keep all employer-specific names/URLs out of git. Placeholders below are generic on purpose. Markers/terms/thresholds (bait_discovery) are non-sensitive and CAN stay here.

jobs._comment: Use a few BROAD seed titles + a positive relevance filter; LinkedIn job search is fuzzy. Avoid bare, ambiguous seed tokens (a short word can match unrelated results).

bait_discovery._comment: Track 3: find target creators posting engagement-bait, then human-approve them into the watchlist. Bait = comment/DM call-to-action PAIRED WITH a promised deliverable (regex in scrape.py: BAIT_CTA_RE + BAIT_DELIVERABLE_RE); hiring posts excluded.

icp._comment: OPTIONAL. Retarget the engagement + bait-discovery tracks to YOUR ICP without editing code. Add any of: tier1 / tier2 / exclude / hiring (regex strings, case-insensitive) and themes ([regex, label] pairs, first match wins). Each overrides the matching built-in placeholder default in scripts/scrape.py; any key you omit keeps its default, so leaving only this comment = use the defaults. Full copy-paste block and a Cursor-style dev-ICP example are in docs/ADAPTING.md.
